entry.title: New: BILL028(25) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE COLLECTION AND DISPOSAL OF REFUSE.

Extends the deadline for the ENV to implement curbside collection of food waste and manufactured compostable materials from April 1, 2025, to April 1, 2026.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
